ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a post office, perhaps dropping off a package or inquiring about a delivery.  The robot will use one arm to extend a hypothetical package, while the other remains in a neutral position. The animation will focus on expressive and functional movements, reflecting the action of delivering or receiving something. Frame 1: The robot starts with both arms at its sides in a neutral position. Frame 2: The robot extends its right arm forward and slightly downward as if offering a package. Frame 3: The arm pauses at that extended position, mimicking a delivery. Frame 4: The arm retracts back to its neutral position.

frames.beat: both arms hang at sides, ready for business
right arm extends forward, offering a package
the package is held out, awaiting acceptance
right arm retracts, the delivery is complete
